services.name: Web Development
services.description: We build modern web applications with React, Vue, or vanilla stacks. From SPAs to SSR and static sites, we focus on performance, SEO, and maintainability.

services.name: Android Development
services.description: Native Android apps with Kotlin and Jetpack. We follow Material Design and ensure compatibility across devices and OS versions.

services.name: iOS Development
services.description: Native iOS apps with Swift and SwiftUI. We deliver apps that feel at home on iPhone and iPad and comply with App Store guidelines.

services.name: Cross-Platform Mobile
services.shortDescription: One codebase for iOS and Android
services.description: React Native or Flutter apps that share logic and UI across iOS and Android. We optimize for performance and native feel.

services.name: UI/UX Design
services.description: Research, wireframes, and high-fidelity designs. We create interfaces that are accessible, consistent, and aligned with your brand.

services.name: API & Backend
services.description: REST and GraphQL APIs, microservices, and cloud infrastructure. We use Laravel, Node, or Go depending on your needs.

pricingTiers.name: Starter
pricingTiers.description: Ideal for MVPs and small projects.

pricingTiers.name: Growth
pricingTiers.description: Full product build with ongoing support.

faq.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq.answer: Small projects (MVP, landing page) often take 4–8 weeks. Full web or mobile apps usually 3–6 months depending on scope. We provide a timeline after discovery.

faq.question: Do you work with startups?
faq.answer: Yes. We work with startups at all stages and can align with equity, milestones, or phased payments where it makes sense.

faq.question: What tech stack do you use?
faq.answer: We choose the stack per project: Laravel, Node, or Go for backend; React, Vue, or Qwik for web; Swift/Kotlin for native; React Native or Flutter for cross-platform. We recommend based on your goals and team.

faq.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer maintenance plans (bug fixes, updates, monitoring) and can scale to ongoing feature work or dedicated capacity.

faq.question: Can you take over an existing project?
faq.answer: Yes. We do audits and handoffs: we review codebase, docs, and infra, then propose a plan for fixes, refactors, or new features.

about.tagline: We build digital products that scale.
about.mission: To partner with ambitious teams and deliver web and mobile solutions that are fast, reliable, and a pleasure to use.

team.name: Alex Johnson
team.bio: Full-stack with a focus on performance and APIs.

team.name: Jordan Lee
team.bio: Native iOS and Android, and cross-platform.

processTimeline.title: Discovery
processTimeline.description: We align on goals, scope, and success metrics.

processTimeline.title: Launch
processTimeline.description: Deploy, monitor, and hand off with docs and support.
